comment: Summit rules metadata (plan 5e). Consumed by src/game/Scoring.ts and src/game/summit.ts.

peakLanes.comment: P-E-A-K: completion lights a free cable-car ride and the WINDBREAK. Letters persist, lane change on the flippers.

instruments.comment: Terrace reads (z-banded pads). All three read (across any number of rides) = a FORECAST: bonus multiplier step + aurora progress; reads reset per forecast.

launch.comment: Leaving the terrace through the east opening ABOVE the gutter line (y < gutterY) is THE LAUNCH; below it is a dribble (safe, unpaid).

wind.comment: Anemometer spins accumulate WIND; at galeSpins the cable car closes for galeS (the hazard you farmed for points).

cornice.comment: Bank completion drops the cornice: avalancheS of doubled scoring; a terrace leave during the slide pays the SNOW JACKPOT.

bothy.comment: Refuge-hut scoop ladder (wrapping); the top rung spots an instrument and lights the GALLERY subway.

lastCar.comment: LAST CAR UP: litRides free cable-car rides bank toward the multiball (virtual locks - the physical dock berths were the brief's cut line); jackpots on rides, SUMMIT JACKPOT on a LAUNCH mid-mode.

aurora.comment: Wizard: three FORECASTs + one LAST CAR UP + one SNOW JACKPOT light the Bothy; 30 s of doubled scores with the car running gale-proof.

skill.comment: LAST CAR (skill shot): a soft plunge peaking in the sensor-skill-lastcar band (fires at <= maxSpeed m/s) pays points and spots an instrument read. Once per ball.
